Container.Name: DVinyl
Container.Overview: A self-hosted media collection manager for your Vinyls, CDs, Books, Games, and DVDs.
Container.Description: DVinyl is a self-hosted media collection manager for your Vinyls, CDs, Books, Games, and DVDs. Keep track of your collection easily. Note: Requires a separate MongoDB instance.
Container.Requires: MongoDB database. You must install a MongoDB container first and link it via the MONGODB_URL variable.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port DVinyl will be accessible on.

Config.Name: Uploads Volume
Config.Description: Directory to store uploaded files like covers.

Config.Name: MongoDB URL
Config.Description: Connection string for your MongoDB instance. Replace [IP_OF_MONGODB] with your MongoDB container IP or Unraid IP if hosted on the same custom network.

Config.Name: JWT Password
Config.Description: Password used for JWT token encryption.

Config.Name: HTTPS Production Mode
Config.Description: Change to true ONLY if you use HTTPS via a reverse proxy.

Config.Name: Vinyl Port Variable
Config.Description: Internal port variable required by the app.

Config.Name: Base URL
Config.Description: Base URL for serving on a sub-path, leave empty to serve from root.

Config.Name: Discogs API Token
Config.Description: Your Discogs API Token for Vinyls/CDs.

Config.Name: Hardcover API Key
Config.Description: Your Hardcover API Key for Books.

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: Your TMDB API Key for DVDs.

Config.Name: Twitch Client ID
Config.Description: Your Twitch Client ID for Games.

Config.Name: Twitch Client Secret
Config.Description: Your Twitch Client Secret for Games.
